title: Bridge Essay: Metacognition of visuomotor decisions in conversion disorder.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dashboard Diagnosis** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Metacognition — self-awareness, self-monitoring, neural correlates of meta-awareness.

**Metacognition of visuomotor decisions in conversion disorder.**. Neuropsychologia.. PMID: 29698734. DOI: 10.1016/j.neuropsychologia.2018.04.018. Motor conversion disorder (CD) entails genuine disturbances in the subjective experience of patients who maintain they are unable to perform amotor function, despite lack of apparent neurological damage. Abilities by which individuals assess their own capacities during performance in atask are called metacognitive, and distinctive impairment of such abilities is observed in several disorders of self-awareness such as blindsight and anosognosia.
